title: Sequences, Recurrences, and Discrete Change · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Forecast savings, inventory, and staged population processes. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a discrete recurrence forecast after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent explicit and recursive sequences and state valid index domains.
Model constant differences and constant ratios with arithmetic and geometric sequences.
Calculate finite sums and explain their accumulated quantity and units.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
